benchmark_id: grunfeld_panel_fmols_weighted_experimental
dataset_file: grunfeld_panel_fmols.csv
panel_id: firm
time_id: year
dependent_variable: linv
regressors: lvalue, lcapital
panel_method: weighted
trend: const
first_stage: level
kernel: bartlett
bandwidth_method: fixed
bandwidth_value: 6
notes: Experimental weighted comparison spec. Use for development, not as the primary public validation target.
